task: Restore visible Day 0 safety checks and questions after completion

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the user-visible issue and real runtime verification before final reporting.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and at least one user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

findings: Production DB case 72 still contained Day 0 draft data: 10 current checked concepts, 2 saved question text entries, 1 saved safety coach answer thread.
Older snapshot 1271439 also contained the same saved questions plus one legacy checked key understand_not_human.
The disappearance was caused by UI rendering: SafetyOrientationBlock was only shown while Day 0 was incomplete, so completed Day 0 hid the saved records.
changes: SafetyOrientationBlock now supports reviewMode for completed Day 0 records.
Completed Day 0 renders the saved safety checks, question text, and coach answers again without showing the practice-gate submit button.
